overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a dusty Western frontier town. The character passes wooden buildings including a gallows, sheriff's office, and boarding house while the sun casts long shadows across the dirt road.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the town entrance past the wooden gallows structure

notable_agents.action: mule standing near the gallows then walking off to the left side

entered.detail: tall wooden gallows with triangular frame and platform
gray mule standing near the gallows base
white wooden church with steeple visible in the distance
reddish-brown dirt path with wagon wheel ruts

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dusty open area on the outskirts of a Western town, approaching a wooden gallows structure with a mule nearby. The white church building stands visible in the distance ahead under a bright blue sky.

events.description: passes under the large wooden archway marking the official town entrance

agents.ego_description: walking under the town archway and proceeding down the main street

notable_agents.action: man sitting on the porch of a small wooden shack
distant figure walking across the open area near the church

entered.detail: large wooden overhead sign structure spanning the road marking town entrance
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires
small weathered wooden building with porch

segments.scene_description: The character passes under a large wooden archway into the town proper, with the white church now closer ahead. A man sits on a porch to the right while utility poles begin to line the dirt street.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with sheriff office and boarding house

agents.ego_description: walking past the Sheriff's Office and a pink two-story boarding house on the right

notable_agents.action: man with hat sitting on the Sheriff's Office porch steps
horse tied to the wooden hitching rail in front of the buildings

entered.detail: weathered wooden building with 'SHERIFF'S OFFICE' sign on the facade
distinctive pink wooden two-story building with 'ROOMS' sign and balcony
dark horse standing hitched to the rail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the main street passing the Sheriff's Office on the right, where a man sits on the porch and a horse is tied to the rail. A prominent pink two-story boarding house with ornate woodwork stands adjacent.

scene_state.functional_zone: edge of town leading to open prairie

agents.ego_description: continuing down the dirt road toward the town outskirts where a wagon waits ahead

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon stationary in the middle of the road ahead

entered.detail: wooden wagon with canvas cover pulled by two horses blocking the road ahead
series of wooden utility poles with wires running alongside the road

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the edge of town where the buildings thin out and a horse-drawn wagon stands in the road ahead. Telegraph poles continue alongside the dirt path leading toward open prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dusty outskirts of a Western town into its main street before heading back toward the open prairie. It begins in an open area near a wooden gallows and a mule, with a white church visible in the distance under a bright blue sky. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts through a large wooden archway into the town proper, where utility poles begin to line the dirt street and a man sits on a nearby porch. The camera then follows the character along the main road, passing the Sheriff's Office and a prominent pink two-story boarding house with ornate woodwork. Finally, the town buildings thin out as the path opens up, passing a horse-drawn wagon and continuing along telegraph poles toward the distant prairie.
